role_summary: Prepare cases and legal matters so accountable advice and advocacy can stand up under scrutiny.
function_statement: Turn facts, precedent, drafts, and review work into matter-ready legal materials.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for factual quality, procedural fitness, and escalation when preparation work changes legal risk.

role_summary: Translate analytical work into decisions, coordination, and adoption inside the business.
function_statement: Turn modeling outputs, tradeoffs, and uncertainty into stakeholder-ready decisions and next steps.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for analytical interpretation, stakeholder clarity, and responsible handoff into action.

role_summary: Keep delivery aligned by managing expectations, escalation paths, and cross-functional tradeoffs.
function_statement: Turn conflicting stakeholder needs into workable sequencing, escalation, and delivery decisions.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for escalation quality, stakeholder alignment, and real-world delivery tradeoffs.
primary_output: Aligned stakeholders and resolved delivery tradeoffs

role_summary: Translate business goals into staffed, resourced, and accountable organizational execution.
function_statement: Turn people, capacity, and performance signals into accountable operating decisions.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for staffing tradeoffs, team performance, and operating accountability.

role_summary: Keep software dependable by reviewing, integrating, documenting, and safeguarding technical decisions.
function_statement: Turn code changes and system complexity into reliable, maintainable software operation.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for production behavior, review quality, and technical integrity.

role_summary: Help operating teams execute within rules by translating controls into workable processes.
function_statement: Turn laws, policy, and controls into usable workflow guardrails and escalation paths.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for implementation clarity, control usability, and escalation of higher-risk issues.

role_summary: Coordinate the publication process so editorial decisions become publishable output on time.
function_statement: Turn drafts, review cycles, contributors, and release timing into coherent publication workflow.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for review flow, contributor alignment, and release readiness.

role_summary: Prepare documentation programs for release by coordinating inputs, review, and readiness across teams.
function_statement: Turn source material, subject-matter review, and release constraints into documentation that ships cleanly.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for review completeness, release fit, and documentation maintainability.

role_summary: Build access, trust, and verification pathways that sustain credible reporting.
function_statement: Turn relationships, sourcing, and on-the-ground verification into reportable information.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for source trust, verification discipline, and judgment under uncertainty.
primary_output: Verified source network and reportable facts

role_summary: Preserve trust with media, partners, and stakeholders while the organization communicates and responds.
function_statement: Turn stakeholder concerns and message risk into coordinated relationship management.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for relationship trust, escalation judgment, and reputational protection.
primary_output: Protected stakeholder trust and coordinated response

role_summary: Protect and grow revenue by keeping active accounts aligned after the initial sale.
function_statement: Turn service delivery context and customer risk into retained trust and account continuity.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for account trust, renewal risk, and coordination when delivery issues threaten revenue.
primary_output: Retained accounts and expanded customer trust
